documentation.description:
------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  Image subprograms for metric (SI) physical values.

  Please note that the rather unusual prefixes centi, deci, Deka, and Hecto
  are not supported by these subprograms.  You can use the Scaling package to
  convert between differently prefixed value and work from there, though.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------

simple_types.name: Prefixes
simple_types.code: type Prefixes is (yocto, zepto, atto, femto, pico, nano, micro, milli, …, Yotta);

documentation.description: Prefixes supported in instantiated Image subprograms.

Magnitude change when trying to find the best representation for a given
value.

subprograms.name: Fixed_Image

documentation.description: Image subroutine that can be instantiated for fixed types.

subprograms.name: Float_Image

documentation.description: Image subroutine that can be instantiated for floating point types.

subprograms.name: Integer_Image

documentation.description: Image subroutine that can be instantiated for integer types.

subprograms.name: Mod_Image

documentation.description: Image subroutine that can be instantiated for modular types.
